BOTTLENECK: latency-bound
REASONING: There is no actual CUDA kernel work in this code: it only calls `cudaDeviceSynchronize()` and prints a message on the host. With no computation or memory traffic to analyze, runtime is dominated by launch/synchronization and host-side overhead rather than GPU throughput limits.
